items.title: Moss wall sign quote for new office
items.summary: The Savage Way (Kimmy) is preparing sizing visuals and pricing for a moss wall sign (104in x 96in) for VYVE's new office space. Follow-up meeting scheduled next week with Dr. Haas after initial sizing discussion with operations.
items.actionNeeded: Review pricing and approve moss wall sign design when Kimmy presents next week.

items.title: UI/UX support meeting scheduled Friday July 3
items.summary: Influex scheduled a UI/UX support meeting for VYVE's internal software project on Friday, July 3 at 2pm-3pm with Angela, Kunvar, Crista, and team.
items.actionNeeded: Attend or delegate attendance for the July 3 UI/UX meeting with Influex.

items.title: Lab diagnostics printing specifications clarified
items.summary: Dr. Haas clarified that lab diagnostic handouts need non-glossy finish (to allow writing). Order is for 100 copies each of TShape handouts and 250 lab diagnostics.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm printer received specification update and order is being processed correctly.

items.title: July 6 call with Hank canceled
items.summary: 2 Market Media canceled the July 6 call with Hank due to travel. They will reconnect on the scheduled July 13 call at 9am ET instead.
items.actionNeeded: Note calendar update — next call with Hank is July 13, not July 6.

items.title: AI implementation payment link and kickoff Thursday
items.summary: Joe from Growth Mastery AI sent Stripe payment link ($9,780 including card fee) for Phase 1 AI Revenue Engine engagement. Kickoff scheduled Thursday July 2 at 4pm ET.
items.actionNeeded: Process payment via Stripe link and confirm kickoff meeting attendance for Thursday 4pm.

items.title: Meeting with PA Lauren Ammar Wednesday 1:30pm
items.summary: Lauren Ammar (PA-C) confirmed availability for virtual meeting Wednesday at 1:30pm. Dr. Haas confirmed he'll meet virtually since working remotely that day.
items.actionNeeded: Ensure calendar invite is sent and virtual meeting link is ready for Wednesday 1:30pm with Lauren.
